conflicts.aStatement: Extraction time for a balanced double espresso is 25 to 30 seconds, measured from the first drop
conflicts.bStatement: Shot time window for balanced double espresso: 25–30 seconds (Maria) vs. 32–38 seconds (Jonas)

conflicts.aStatement: For medium roasts, set the machine to 93–94 degrees Celsius; below 93°C underextraction occurs and the cup tastes hollow
conflicts.bStatement: For medium roasts, brew temperature should be 92 degrees Celsius
conflicts.reason: They specify different brew temperatures for medium roasts: 93-94°C versus 92°C.

conflicts.aStatement: Standard double espresso dose is 18 grams of coffee
